task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application window is visible on the screen.
A fishbone diagram template or a manually drawn spine with intersecting branches is visible on the EdrawMax canvas.

task_completion.description: Add the main effect 'Online Banking System Outage'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Online Banking System Outage' is visible at the head (right side typically) of the fishbone diagram.

task_completion.description: Add the 6 main categories to the branches
task_completion.visual_evidence: The words 'People', 'Process', 'Technology', 'Environment', 'Management', and 'Measurement' are visible as labels on the main branches of the fishbone.

task_completion.description: Add specific sub-causes to the categories
task_completion.visual_evidence: Specific sub-cause texts (e.g., 'Insufficient on-call staffing', 'Database connection pool exhausted', 'No rollback procedure documented') are visible attached to the corresponding category branches.

task_completion.description: Save as EDDX and export as PNG to the Diagrams folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog box shows the files being named 'fishbone_outage_rca.eddx' and 'fishbone_outage_rca.png' in the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory, or a file manager shows these files exist in that location.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax graphical user interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with EdrawMax menus, toolbars, and canvas, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The output is a genuine diagram with shapes and connectors.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is placed within or alongside diagram shapes (lines, arrows, boxes) forming a fishbone, not just plain text pasted onto a blank canvas.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the application's save/export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The files are saved/exported using EdrawMax's File menu, rather than using commands like 'touch' or 'cp' in the terminal to create dummy files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are exactly '/home/ga/Diagrams/fishbone_outage_rca.eddx' and '/home/ga/Diagrams/fishbone_outage_rca.png'. The diagram must contain specific text including the main effect 'Online Banking System Outage', the categories 'People', 'Process', 'Technology', 'Environment', 'Management', 'Measurement', and specific sub-causes such as 'Insufficient on-call staffing', 'No rollback procedure documented', 'Database connection pool exhausted', 'Data center cooling failure', 'Incident response budget', and 'SLA breach detection'.
